basic_details.short_information: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech, B.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 22-05-2026, and closes on 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RECPDCL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Engineering/Technology or Bachelor of Science with relevant experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,35,000/- per month plus other benefits.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RECPDCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: RECPDCL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
